response.justification: The candidate clears the 15-year experience bar and shows recent hands-on AI-agent tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks), but the trajectory is senior/staff full-stack product engineering rather than director-level technical strategy. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms at scale, advanced AI education, or the kind of organization-wide influence and customer-facing strategic advisory this principal role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling
Founder experience (GISCollective) and public speaking/workshop track record showing initiative and knowledge-sharing
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI/ML expertise or AI-powered products at platform scale
Career level is senior/staff IC on product teams, well below the director-level strategic scope of the role
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth; experience centers on application development rather than defining future-state cloud/AI direction

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap versus director-level principal role
Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Long, diverse engineering experience with recent agentic-AI tooling
